non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner acquired 8522.0 shares of Common Stock, nominal value Euro0.06 at $0.0 (Code A). [Note 1: Represents 8,522 restricted stock units ("RSUs") granted under the Expro Group Holdings N.V. Long-Term Incentive Plan, as Amended and Restated to Mr. Arbeter, an employee of OHA and a member of the Board of Directors of the Issuer, as annual compensation to the non-employee members of the Board of Directors of the Issuer. Each RSU represents a contingent right to receive, upon vesting, one share of common stock, nominal value Euro0.06 per share, of the Issuer ("Common Stock"). The RSUs vest on May 1, 2022. Pursuant to the policies of OHA, the RSUs received by Mr. Arbeter are held for the benefit of certain clients of OHA.]

footnotes.1: Represents 8,522 restricted stock units ("RSUs") granted under the Expro Group Holdings N.V. Long-Term Incentive Plan, as Amended and Restated to Mr. Arbeter, an employee of OHA and a member of the Board of Directors of the Issuer, as annual compensation to the non-employee members of the Board of Directors of the Issuer. Each RSU represents a contingent right to receive, upon vesting, one share of common stock, nominal value Euro0.06 per share, of the Issuer ("Common Stock"). The RSUs vest on May 1, 2022. Pursuant to the policies of OHA, the RSUs received by Mr. Arbeter are held for the benefit of certain clients of OHA.
